name: Chicken and Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the chicken breasts in half.
2. Dredge each breast in flour seasoned with salt and pepper.
3. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Brown the chicken breasts in the butter, turning occasionally until browned on all sides.
5. Remove the chicken to a shallow, covered baking dish.
6. Sauté the peppers in the same skillet until they are limp and slightly softened.
7. Add the sautéed peppers to the baking dish with the chicken.
8. Add wine to the skillet and cook for one minute, scraping bits from the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon.
9. Remove the skillet from heat, add the herbs to the wine, and pour over the chicken.
10. Cover the baking dish and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes, basting once or twice during cooking.
